settings.title: How long do CBV candles burn?
settings.answer: Burn time depends on size and usage, but our candles are designed for long-lasting performance. For best results, allow a full melt pool on initial burns and trim your wick to 1/4 inch before each use.

settings.title: How strong is the scent throw?
settings.answer: Our scented candles are formulated for a balanced scent throw that fills your space without overwhelming it. Room size, airflow, and fragrance profile can all influence perception.

settings.title: Do candles need to cure before use?
settings.answer: Many candle formulas benefit from additional cure time after pouring. If your candle arrives freshly poured, letting it rest for several days can improve hot throw and burn consistency.

settings.title: How does the custom candle builder work?
settings.answer: On eligible products, choose your format, fragrance, and preferred options, then add to cart. The builder is designed to make custom candles easy while keeping the process guided and intuitive.

settings.title: Do you offer wickless options?
settings.answer: Yes. Select products include wickless formats designed for wax warmers, giving you flame-free fragrance options with the same signature CBV scent experience.

settings.title: How do I use wax melts?
settings.answer: Place 1–2 pieces in your approved wax warmer dish and allow the wax to melt completely. Add or replace wax as needed based on scent strength and warmer size.

settings.title: How are wax melts different from candles?
settings.answer: Wax melts provide fragrance without an exposed flame and are ideal for layering scent throughout your home. Candles offer both ambiance and fragrance in one experience.

settings.title: How do candle subscriptions work?
settings.answer: Choose eligible custom candles, standard candles, or wax melts and select a recurring delivery frequency. Your orders are then processed automatically according to your selected schedule.

settings.title: Can I manage or cancel my subscription?
settings.answer: Absolutely. You can update cadence, skip upcoming orders, swap products, pause, or cancel from your account portal at any time.

settings.title: How long does processing take?
settings.answer: Most orders are prepared within the processing window shown at checkout. During promotions or seasonal peaks, processing may take slightly longer as we maintain quality control.

settings.title: When will my order arrive?
settings.answer: Shipping speed depends on the method selected at checkout and destination. You’ll receive tracking once your order ships so you can follow delivery progress in real time.

settings.caption: Support Center
settings.heading: How can we help?
settings.text: Find quick answers about our custom candles, massive scent library, and subscription services before you order, or track things down after delivery.
